name: red/blue team
prompt: Red team the requirement for misuse, failure, ambiguity, and invalid success claims; blue team the minimum evidence needed to defend the requirement.

calibration.business: Use business-facing wording: outcomes, policy, users, acceptance, and decision ownership; avoid implementation jargon.
calibration.technical: Use technical wording: data contracts, interfaces, constraints, failure modes, observability, and implementation surfaces.

evidence_contract: A red-team finding can merge only when its concern is anchored in a verbatim local quote.
